title: Scarce technician allocation to maintenance jobs
prompt: Each morning a service manager assigns certified technicians to a subset of known maintenance jobs. Job values and durations are known, but emergency arrivals later in the day are outside the model. Frame resource allocation and opportunity cost without claiming robustness to emergencies.

model_specification.mechanism: Assigning scarce qualified hours to one job prevents their use on another known job.

fidelity_requirements: Emergency work is out of scope
Job value is the modeled objective
prohibited_inferences: The solution remains optimal after emergency arrivals
